command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute 
UPDATE author_profiles
SET photoSource = 'ai'
WHERE photoSource IS NULL
  AND photoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND photoUrl LIKE '%/author-photos/ai-%';

SELECT photoSource, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM author_profiles GROUP BY photoSource ORDER BY cnt DESC;
